readme.purpose: Annual inflation rate schedule used to deflate nominal values and grow inflation-adjusted targets. Fed long-run target is ~2.0%. Recent 2022-2024 experience was 4-9%.
readme.years: Year range. Use '1-30' for a flat assumption across the whole simulation.
readme.rate_pct: Annual inflation rate as a percentage. E.g. 2.3 = 2.3% per year. Applied as a compound rate within each year block.
